title: OCI Cloud Shell Session Started
description: Detects OCI Cloud Shell session activation. Cloud Shell provides authenticated CLI access to the tenancy and can be used for reconnaissance, data access, or lateral movement.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.cloudshell.startenvironment' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.cloudshell.createenvironment')))
